# Launch Checklist

Use this checklist to ensure everything is ready for the E-GEO launch.

---

## Pre-Launch (1-2 days before)

### Repository Setup
- [ ] Repository description set (60 chars max)
  ```
  Zero-effort Generative Engine Optimization. Rank higher in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini with one command. Based on published research.
  ```
- [ ] Topics configured (8-10 relevant tags)
  ```
  geo, generative-engine-optimization, ai-search, chatgpt-optimization, perplexity, claude, llm, content-optimization, seo, schema-markup
  ```
- [ ] About URL configured (arXiv paper link)
- [ ] Discussions enabled
- [ ] Social preview image uploaded

### Content
- [ ] README is GEO-optimized with all badges
- [ ] Documentation is complete (getting-started, how-it-works, faq)
- [ ] Contributing guidelines include AI transparency
- [ ] Code of conduct is present
- [ ] Issue and PR templates exist

### Issues
- [ ] Created 5 "good first issue" issues
- [ ] Issues have clear descriptions and expectations
- [ ] Issues are tagged with `good first issue` label

### Release
- [ ] Release v1.0.0 drafted
- [ ] Release notes finalized
- [ ] Chelog is complete

### Launch Materials
- [ ] Hacker News post drafted
- [ ] Reddit post drafted
- [ ] Twitter thread drafted
- [ ] Launch materials reviewed

---

## Launch Day (Tuesday-Wednesday, 9am-12pm PT)

### 1 Hour Before
- [ ] Early adopters notified (DM/email 20-30 people)
- [ ] Launch posts double-checked
- [ ] Repository set to public (if private)

### T-0 (Launch Time)
- [ ] **Release v1.0.0 published** on GitHub
- [ ] Repository description/topics verified
- [ ] Hacker News post submitted
- [ ] Reddit post submitted to r/MachineLearning

### T+30 minutes
- [ ] Twitter thread posted
- [ ] Personal social posts (LinkedIn, etc.)

### T+2 hours (Critical Window)
- [ ] Respond to all Hacker News comments
- [ ] Respond to all Reddit comments
- [ ] Respond to Twitter replies
- [ ] Monitor GitHub stars count
- [ ] Address any immediate issues

### T+4 hours
- [ ] Check GitHub Issues for new submissions
- [ ] Respond to GitHub Discussions
- [ ] Update launch metrics

---

## Post-Launch (Days 1-7)

### Day 1
- [ ] Review all launch metrics
- [ ] Respond to remaining comments
- [ ] Fix any critical bugs found
- [ ] Thank early stars/adopters

### Day 2-3
- [ ] Write launch recap post
- [ ] Update documentation based on feedback
- [ ] Address "good first issues" if feasible
- [ ] Monitor traffic and engagement

### Day 7
- [ ] Review week 1 metrics
- [ ] Plan roadmap based on feedback
- [ ] Thank contributors
- [ ] Consider follow-up content (blog, video)

---

## Early Adopters List

Compile a list of 20-30 people to notify at launch:

### Categories
- **SaaS founders** (target 10)
- **SEO/marketing folks** (target 8)
- **AI/ML researchers** (target 5)
- **Open source contributors** (target 5)
- **Personal network** (target 5)

### Notification Template

```
Hey [Name],

I'm launching E-GEO today, an open-source toolkit for optimizing content for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude).

It's based on published research and does full GEO optimization in one command. Would love your feedback if you're interested!

GitHub: [link]
HN post: [link] (if live)

Best,
[Your name]
```

---

## Metrics to Track

| Metric | Target | Track via |
|--------|--------|-----------|
| GitHub Stars | 50+ | GitHub |
| HN upvotes | 50+ | Hacker News |
| Reddit upvotes | 20+ | Reddit |
| Twitter engagements | 100+ | Twitter Analytics |
| GitHub issues/PRs | 5+ | GitHub |
| Website clicks | 200+ | GitHub Traffic |

---

## Launch Time Zones

**Target:** Tuesday-Wednesday, 9am-12pm PT

| Timezone | Time |
|----------|------|
| PT (Pacific) | 9am - 12pm |
| ET (Eastern) | 12pm - 3pm |
| UTC | 5pm - 8pm |
| CET | 6pm - 9pm |
| IST | 10:30pm - 1:30am (+1 day) |
| AEST | 3am - 6am (+1 day) |

**Best global overlap:** 9am PT = 5pm UTC (Europe morning, Asia late night)

---

## Contingency Plans

### If Hacker News flags as spam
- Wait 24 hours
- Repost with different angle
- Focus on Reddit and Twitter

### If critical bug found
- Address immediately
- Post transparent update
- Fix within 24 hours

### If low engagement
- Repost with different angle
- Share in niche communities
- Direct outreach to early adopters

---

## Success Criteria

Launch is successful if:
- ✅ 50+ GitHub stars in first week
- ✅ Front page of Hacker News OR 50+ upvotes
- ✅ 5+ community issues/PRs submitted
- ✅ Positive feedback on methodology

---

**Good luck with the launch! 🚀**
